tasks.label: Git 轉接站 (Relay Repo) — Push [20250326-ENV-001]
args: set -euo pipefail; RELAY_FILE="${WORKSPACE_FOLDER}/.env.relay"; if [ -f "$RELAY_FILE" ]; then set -a; . "$RELAY_FILE"; set +a; fi; REMOTE="${RELAY_REMOTE:-origin}"; BRANCH="${RELAY_BRANCH:-$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)}"; echo "[20250326-ENV-001] Pushing to relay: $REMOTE $BRANCH"; git push -u "$REMOTE" "$BRANCH"
